# Welcome to Have Fun and Do Stuff

Have Fun and Do Stuff is a 16-game browser arcade led by 3D racing, block-building, platforming, first-person shooting, rhythm dash games, and classic arcade games. The site has one YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/@EPICMAPPING023

Main page:
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/

Games:
- Neon Cube Dash: A rhythm cube runner with spikes, platforms, orbs, and pulsing neon lanes.
- Turbo Racer 3D: A one-minute 3D race against bot cars with boost, coins, and traffic.
- Arena FPS 3D: A first-person blaster with bots and browser-to-browser online duels.
- Spotlight Dash 3D: Race through a dark stage while a giant spotlight follows you.
- Sky Platformer 3D: A 20-level 3D platform run with floating islands, coins, lava, and finish gates.
- Block Builder 3D: A first-person block-building sandbox for stacking cubes inside a tiny voxel world.
- Classic Snake: Eat snacks, grow longer, and do not crash into yourself.
- Solo Pong: Keep the ball alive with one paddle and chase a high score.
- Falling Blocks: Drop, rotate, and clear rows in a Tetris-style puzzle.
- Two Player Pong: A local multiplayer Pong match for two people.
- Brick Breaker: Bounce the ball and smash every brick.
- Asteroid Drift: Pilot through drifting rocks and stay alive.
- Invader Blast: Slide, shoot, and knock down the invader row.
- Maze Run: Reach the exit without touching walls.
- Stack Jump: Jump over blocks and keep running.
- Target Pop: Click targets before the timer runs out.
